package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "errors"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for same_domain_error_mapped_to_multiple_statuses: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: The same error type being converted to different HTTP status codes in the same module.
type CaseSameDomainErrorMappedToMultipleStatusesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSameDomainErrorMappedToMultipleStatusesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSameDomainErrorMappedToMultipleStatusesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSameDomainErrorMappedToMultipleStatusesModel
}

type CaseSameDomainErrorMappedToMultipleStatusesService struct {
    repo *CaseSameDomainErrorMappedToMultipleStatusesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSameDomainErrorMappedToMultipleStatusesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSameDomainErrorMappedToMultipleStatuses(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSameDomainErrorMappedToMultipleStatusesDTO) error {

    ErrNotFound := errors.New("entity not found")
    var model CaseSameDomainErrorMappedToMultipleStatusesModel
    if err := db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil {
        if errors.Is(err, gorm.ErrRecordNotFound) {
            return fmt.Errorf("%w: %s", ErrNotFound, input)
        }
        return err
    }
    if model.Status == "" {
        c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": ErrNotFound.Error()})
        return nil
    }
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": ErrNotFound.Error()})
    return nil
}
